## Swarm Task: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

**Task ID:** s1
**Title:** Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to identify key features and capabilities of ClaudeCode. Document your findings including unique functionalities, user interface elements, and technical implementations that could inform our product improvements.

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task.

IMPORTANT: Your VERY FIRST action must be a tool call. Call `team_read_messages` with team_name set to the team name from your context. Do NOT respond with text first — call the tool immediately.

After reading messages, do the work described above using tool calls (glob, read, bash, etc.). When done, call `team_task_complete` to mark task "s1" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.
